sentence_reviews.text: Queries from one stream attend to keys and values from another stream or memory source.

sentence_reviews.text: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Self-attention, Multimodal, simulated & streaming data.
